widgets_values: If these nodes produce an error, manually put in 1.5 as crop_factor.

Using the style of the image, create a candid close up of the characters face with a neutral expression and neutral lighting. Frontal view looking into the camera. The character is in front of a white background. Keep the proportions and facial features exactly the same.
Create a side view of the head showing the characters profile. Keep the proportions, clothes and facial features exactly the same.  In front of a white background. Close up of the head.
Create an over the shoulder view. Back of the characters head looking away from the camera. In front of a white background.
Make the character lay on the ground in a relaxed model pose. White background. Keep the clothes and style exactly the same.
Put the character in a neutral t-pose. A full body standing with arms outstretched. In front of a white background.
Put the character in a neutral t-pose. A full body side view looking at a profile view of the character standing with arms outstretched. In front of a white background.
Put the character in a neutral t-pose. A full body back view of the character standing with arms outstretched. In front of a white background.
Using the style of the image, make this character sit in a park on a sunny day. The character is looking up into the sky, low angle shot. Keep the proportions and facial features exactly the same.
Place this figure in a cozy café. Keep the proportions and facial features exactly the same.  Keep the characters clothes and style exactly the same.

Using the style of the image, put this character in a tropical rainforest during sunset holding a tropical cocktail in their hand. The sunlight illuminates the smiling face. The character is happy. Keep the facial features exactly the same.
Change the pose of the character. Keep the character and facial features exactly the same
(masterpiece), photography, realistic skin, imperfect, visible facial pores, (visible facial wrinkles:0.5)
A wide shot of the character sitting on a rock at the beach. Keep the characters clothes and style exactly the same. Keep the proportions and facial features exactly the same.

Using the style of the image, put the character in a dark spooky castle at night and change the pose. The characters face is illuminated by dim candlelight, the character is scared. The strong moonlight creates a strong backlight creating a dramatic look. The moonlight is reflecting from the skin.

nodes.title: Models
widgets_values:
You can download 4xUltraSharp via the ComfyUI manager. But any upsale model will do here!

📁 ComfyUI\models\upscale_models

nodes.title: Name your character. This will be the output folder and caption trigger word.
Set your final UPSCALE RESOLUTION here:
PROMPT (One Sentence: Describe style, character, clothes...)
widgets_values: Make an image in this style of the character.

Optional: 

Create a simple one-sentence prompt. Describe the image style and clothing, especially elements not fully visible in your input image.

If you are using a stylized character use something like: 

Make an image in this style of [an anime illustration of an elf].

create a full body turnaround sheet of this exact character, four full-body poses on pure white background: front view, left profile, back view, — evenly spaced in a clean horizontal row, consistent lighting and style, no background noise, no shadows, same proportions and detailing across all views,  wearing chunky sneakers
Keep the character and facial features exactly the same. The person is in front of a white backgound. Make the character wear the grey winter coat.
Put the character in a full-body side view walking in a cinematic landscape with soft lighting. Keep the proportions and style exactly the same.
Place this person in a subway train, she is holding a brown bag. Keep the characters clothes and style exactly the same.

nodes.title: PROMPT
